phaseGoal: 让 $threadsmith 的 full governance 保留 planner -> executor -> reviewer -> verifier -> closeout 的安全职责，同时降低每个角色自身的运行成本、上下文噪音和重复发现成本。
deliverable: 完成 role runtime metrics、phase evidence bundle、role-scoped packet slimming、planner mode routing、staged verification policy 与 packet-slimming regression fixtures，并完成 closeout 验证。
inScope: 为 phase run 记录 role runtime metrics
为 phase run 预生成 reusable evidence bundle
按角色收窄 role packet context refs
实现 planning-phase / planner-reset / planner-lite / direct-executor 的 planner mode routing
实现 verifier narrow / standard / release staged verification policy
补充 packet-slimming regression fixtures，防止关键上下文被误删
运行 domain / fs-bridge / runtime / orchestrator / skill contract / project truth / diff hygiene 验证
outOfScope: 移除 planner / reviewer / verifier / closeout 任一安全角色
用时间预算替代质量门禁
stopCondition: Role runtime speedup v1 已完成实现、回归测试与 closeout 验证；全局 skill 保持未同步，后续是否同步由用户另行确认。
